title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: A video tutorial building a multi-agent AI travel planning system using LangGraph and Groq's Llama 3.3 70B model. The system integrates four specialized agents for flights, hotels, itineraries, and responses, with PostgreSQL memory, Tavily search, and AviationStack APIs.
